proposed_concepts.name: ae-cli-json-envelope
proposed_concepts.spec: Every `ae` CLI command wraps its result in a map with keys `success` (bool), `command` (string path), `data` (command-specific payload), and `meta` (object always containing `timing_ms` and `versions`). On unhandled exceptions the same envelope shape is emitted with `success: false` and an `internal_error` code.
proposed_concepts.invariant: The envelope is emitted to stdout unconditionally before `run` returns, even on parse or dispatch errors. `--human` mode renders a text representation of the same envelope data rather than suppressing the envelope.
proposed_concepts.rationale: This is a cross-cutting output contract that governs all subcommands of AeCli, not a discrete symbol. It cannot be assigned to any single seeded row. Surface as a proposed concept for documentation or a future `ae_cli_envelope` canonical entry.
